title: Synthetic fixture: pre-populated synthetic-backfill row preserved as-is (D9 additive-merge round-trip)
body:
## Summary

Synthetic v4 fixture for D9 additive-merge round-trip with a pre-populated synthetic-backfill row.
The pipeline-metrics block carries a ce-gate-cli credit with a mode.synthetic-backfill row that includes block_kind.
The back-deriver must preserve that row as-is (no overwrite, no double-write) and fill the remaining 15 ports.

Refs #502

<!-- pipeline-metrics
metrics_version: 4
credits:
  - port: ce-gate-cli
    status: inconclusive
    block_kind: environment
    evidence: "Pre-existing synthetic-backfill: environment blocked CLI surface at audit time."
    mode:
      synthetic-backfill:
        backfilled_at: 2026-04-10T00:00:00Z
        original_pr_merged_at: 2026-04-02T12:00:00Z
-->
